The '''''Kierra''''' was the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Thaddeus Ross]]. She was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] transport whose [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems were inhabited by a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] consciousness of the same name with a [[Gender/Legends|feminine]] voice and personality. Ross stumbled across and activated her subroutines when he acquired the ship. It was Ross who first applied the ship's name to the virtual entity.

{{Ship-stub}}
